changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS partner_id_seq START 1;
CREATE TABLE partner (
id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT nextval('partner_id_seq'),
serial_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, display_name VARCHAR(255), parent_id BIGINT, is_company BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false, company_type VARCHAR(20) ,
customer_rank INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, supplier_rank INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
street VARCHAR(255), street2 VARCHAR(255), city VARCHAR(100), zip VARCHAR(20), state_id INT, country_id INT,
email VARCHAR(255), phone VARCHAR(50), mobile VARCHAR(50), website VARCHAR(255),
property_account_receivable_id BIGINT, property_account_payable_id BIGINT,
vat VARCHAR(50), credit_limit NUMERIC(15,2) DEFAULT 0, currency_id INT,
employee BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
type VARCHAR(20) , lang VARCHAR(10), tz VARCHAR(50),
company_name VARCHAR(255), commercial_company_name VARCHAR(255), commercial_partner_id BIGINT,
industry_id INT, property_payment_term_id INT, property_product_price_list_id INT,
created_by character varying(50) , created_date timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL, last_modified_by character varying(50) , last_modified_date timestamp(6) without time zone, deleted_by character varying(50) , deleted_date timestamp(6) without time zone, is_delete boolean DEFAULT false,
CONSTRAINT fk_partner_parent FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES partner(id), CONSTRAINT fk_partner_commercial FOREIGN KEY (commercial_partner_id) REFERENCES partner(id) );
CREATE INDEX idx_partner_serial_id ON partner(serial_id); CREATE INDEX idx_partner_name ON partner(name); CREATE INDEX idx_partner_parent ON partner(parent_id); CREATE INDEX idx_partner_customer_rank ON partner(customer_rank); CREATE INDEX idx_partner_supplier_rank ON partner(supplier_rank);
INSERT INTO partner ( serial_id, name, is_company , company_type, commercial_partner_id, created_by , created_date , last_modified_by , last_modified_date ) VALUES ( 'PA0000000001', 'ISolution APP', true, 'SYSTEM', 1 , '01110010908' , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, '01110010908', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );
